title: utf8mb4 Collation Errors During Import (Fix Guide)
description: Seeing collation errors during import? Here’s how to fix mismatched character sets safely.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: Collation errors mean your target database doesn’t support the dump’s character set.

items: Import in smaller chunks to isolate issues

content.text: Splitting helps you pinpoint the failing statements. See: **How to Split a mysqldump File Into Smaller Parts**.

content.title: Isolate failing statements
content.text: Split the dump and find the exact collation conflict.

faq.question: Do I need to edit the whole dump?
faq.answer: Sometimes only a few tables use the conflicting collation.
